etymology.description: 陳(陳) (chén, "display; explain; old") is a common surname. 毅(毅) (yì, "firm; resolute") suggests strength of character.
etymology.interpretation: In this context, 陳(陳) (chén, "display; explain; old") is used strictly as a surname with no additional meaning. 毅(毅) (yì, "firm; resolute") conveys a sense of strong and unwavering determination, a positive quality often associated with personal names. The name may suggest a person of resolute character.

examples.chinese: 陈毅(陳毅)是中国著名的军事家(是中國著名的軍事家)。
examples.pinyin: Chén Yì shì Zhōngguó zhùmíng de jūnshìjiā.
examples.english: Chen Yi was a renowned Chinese military leader.

examples.chinese: 在历史课上(在歷史課上)，我们学习了陈毅的事迹(我們學習了陳毅的事蹟)。
examples.pinyin: Zài lìshǐ kè shàng, wǒmen xuéxí le Chén Yì de shìjī.
examples.english: In history class, we learned about Chen Yi's achievements.

examples.chinese: 陈毅(陳毅)早年参加了中国共产党(早年參加了中國共產黨)。
examples.pinyin: Chén Yì zǎonián cānjiā le Zhōngguó Gòngchǎndǎng.
examples.english: Chen Yi joined the Chinese Communist Party in his early years.
